text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So it's finally here. The last race of the Tiara
tour... The Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer... I know we're short on time, but
once we're in, there's somewhere I'd like to go
first.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well... it's complicated.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm coming in.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Scarlet?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You sure startle easily. Shouldn't a
delinquent be more like, "The heck you doin'
here?!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, cram it. Why are you here anyways? The race is gonna start soon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I know. This will only take a minute.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I take back what I said before. About calling you
lame.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Besides, you're the one being lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You gave up on the Tiara tour, right? You figured
you couldn't get first place with me in the
running.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now, don't get me wrong.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're a pain in the butt, you never make sense,
and you're always mouthing off about cool this
and cool that... Ugh, I'm getting mad just thinking
about it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: If there's one thing you're not, it's lame.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not gonna let you have first place. I won't
let you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win the Shuka Sho. I'll prove that I'm
stronger than you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Not only to the crowd but to myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So you'd better get ready—because you're going
down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna eat those words when I speed right
past ya.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Talk is cheap. I'd like to see you try.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get a move on, shall we? Our race
awaits.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to beat her—no matter what!
